turns.text: Hi, thanks for calling Riverside Heating & Cooling. How can I help you today?
Oh hello dear, my furnace is making a clanking sound. Is that something you all can look at?
Yes we can. Quick check — is this an emergency or can it wait until our next business day?
Oh no, it can wait, just an odd noise.
Good. What's a good first name to text the booking link to?
My name is Margaret.
Thanks Margaret — can I text you a link to pick the time that works?
Yes please.
Sending it now.
I just sent that to your phone — you should see the link in a few seconds.
Riverside Heating & Cooling, how can I help?
Yeah look I need someone out today. I'm in Truckee — can you get there?
Let me check coverage for Truckee — sec.
Truckee is just outside our area but I can take your details and have dispatch call you back in 10 minutes to confirm.
Fine, do that.
Texting you the intake form now.
Riverside Heating & Cooling, how can I help?
Hello, please... my air... no cooling. House very hot. Can you come?
I'm sorry — is this an emergency right now, or can it wait until tomorrow?
Tomorrow is okay.
Good. I'll text you the booking link — pick the time that works.
Riverside Heating & Cooling.
So my neighbor said you guys do plumbing too? And I have this thing with my furnace...
We do heating and cooling — for plumbing the technician can refer you on site. Let me start with the furnace. Is it an emergency, or can it wait?
Oh it can wait. Just clicking noise.
Got it — texting you the booking link.
Hi, Riverside Heating & Cooling — how can I help?
Wait — am I talking to a real person or one of those AI bots?
I'm the AI assistant for Riverside Heating & Cooling — I help schedule visits. How can I help?
Huh. Okay, my furnace is making noise.
Got it. Emergency, or can it wait?
Can wait.
Texting you the booking link.
